title: Pan-Roasted Parsnip with Jalebi Crunch
description: A sweet and savory vegetarian dish that combines the natural sweetness of parsnips with the crunchy texture of jalebi.
instructions: Toss the parsnip cubes with olive oil, salt, black pepper, and garam masala on a baking sheet.
Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the parsnips are tender and caramelized.
While the parsnips are roasting, heat a small amount of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the crushed jalebi to the pan and cook until crispy and golden brown.
Once the parsnips are done, remove them from the oven and let them cool slightly.
Toss the roasted parsnips with the crispy jalebi pieces and serve hot.
